'''Lieutenant Reiss''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] assigned to the [[Marduk]] under Systems Sub-Commander [[Jared Brojtal]]. Following the attack on the [[Syndaar Military Prep School]] by the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] terrorist [[Ort Hoogra-D'En]], Reiss had the unenviable task of informing Sub-Commander Brojtal that his son was killed.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Gone To Ground|book=No Disintegrations (West End Games)}} {{1st}}
